scope: User-observed PQ35 comfort/infotainment CAN seeds for passive Open MMI research
safety: Passive/candidate data only. Do not transmit or replay these frames from Open MMI runtime.

signals.name: dimmer_470_b2
signals.notes: User-observed 0x00..0x64 as 0..100%. Aligned against HVAC truth with corr about +0.992 at offset -6s on 2026-07-01 capture.

signals.name: speed_351_b1_candidate
signals.notes: Strong low-speed candidate after timing alignment; needs wider 0-30 km/h validation. Byte 0 also carries reverse-state observations.

signals.name: speed_527_b1_candidate
signals.notes: Top low-speed correlation in aligned capture; may be a duplicate/derived speed broadcast. Needs validation before runtime use.

signals.name: blower_3e1_b4_candidate
signals.notes: Strong aligned candidate; likely HVAC blower/turbine load. Needs second blower low/mid/high capture.

signals.name: steering_angle_3c3_b0_b1
signals.formula: counts * 0.04375; byte1 bit7 appears to encode direction
signals.notes: Needs formal validation before use. Bytes 5 and 7 likely counter/checksum.
